calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

H. Clyde Long, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Jack Rose.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Anthony Larkin.
Defult of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-5 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Jack Rose sworn and examined on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $3,450.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $660.00
Attorney's Fees: $2,700.00
Costs: $280.00
Other: $6,900.00 per CCP 1950.5 (l)
Total Judgment in the amount of $13,990.00
Court finds that the defendant retained the $3,450 security deposit in bad faith and awards twice the amount of security deposit - $6,900 - as statutory damages under Civil Code Section 1950.5 (l).
Judgment signed in open court.

Judgment signed in open court.
